name: Homemade
description: Homemade diets are prepared from scratch by owners using whole food ingredients. While they offer full control over ingredients, they require careful formulation to ensure nutritional completeness and balance.
suitable_for: owners with time and nutritional knowledge
dogs whose conditions require highly customised nutrition
dogs with poor response to commercial foods
benefits: Full control over ingredient quality and sourcing
Can be tailored exactly to a dog's health needs
risks: Nutritional imbalance is common without expert guidance
Risk of bacterial contamination if handling is poor
Requires consultation with a veterinary nutritionist
recommended_brands: N/A — consult a board-certified veterinary nutritionist
Use BalanceIT or PetDiets.com for recipe formulation

small.cups_per_day: Calculated by vet nutritionist based on recipe

medium.cups_per_day: Calculated by vet nutritionist based on recipe

large.cups_per_day: Calculated by vet nutritionist based on recipe

giant.cups_per_day: Calculated by vet nutritionist based on recipe
